steps.title: Identify the time-based contrast
steps.content: The metro expanded “as recently as 2020,” yet will need “further expansions.” This creates a concessive relationship: despite recent action, more will be needed.

steps.title: Select the transition for this relationship
steps.content: ”Still” (meaning “nonetheless”) captures this logic perfectly. The other choices express contrast, exemplification, or substitution instead. That matches choice A — A is correct.
